name: taste-skill
description: Taste skill library for Claude Code — frontend design, image-to-code, and aesthetic skills. Install the full bundle or pick individual skills as standalone plugins.

plugins.name: taste-skill
plugins.description: Full bundle: every taste-skill design skill in one plugin — anti-slop frontend defaults, style variants (soft, minimalist, brutalist), redesign and image-to-code workflows, and image-generation skills (web, mobile, brand kits).

plugins.name: design-taste
plugins.description: The core anti-slop frontend skill (v2 experimental) plus the preserved v1. Reads the brief, infers the design language, and tunes VARIANCE / MOTION / DENSITY dials for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns.

plugins.name: gpt-taste
plugins.description: Stricter GPT/Codex-oriented variant: Python-driven layout randomization, strict AIDA page structure, gapless bento grids, and advanced GSAP scroll motion enforcement.

plugins.name: image-to-code
plugins.description: Image-first website pipeline: generate design reference images, deeply analyze them, then implement the frontend to match as closely as possible.

plugins.name: redesign-ui
plugins.description: Upgrades existing websites and apps to premium quality: audits the current design, identifies generic AI patterns, then fixes layout, spacing, hierarchy, and styling.

plugins.name: soft-ui
plugins.description: High-end agency look: polished, calm, expensive UI with softer contrast, generous whitespace, premium fonts, and spring motion.

plugins.name: minimalist-ui
plugins.description: Clean editorial product UI (Notion/Linear vibes): warm monochrome palette, typographic contrast, flat bento grids, crisp structure.

plugins.name: brutalist-ui
plugins.description: Industrial brutalism: Swiss typographic print fused with tactical terminal aesthetics — rigid grids, extreme type scale contrast, utilitarian color, analog degradation effects.

plugins.name: stitch-design
plugins.description: Google Stitch-compatible semantic design system rules, including the optional agent-friendly DESIGN.md export format.

plugins.name: output-enforcement
plugins.description: Overrides default LLM truncation behavior: enforces complete code generation, bans placeholder comments, and handles token-limit continuations.

plugins.name: imagegen-web
plugins.description: Image generation for website comps: hero, landing, and multi-section design references with strong typography, spacing, and anti-slop art direction.

plugins.name: imagegen-mobile
plugins.description: Image generation for mobile screens and flows: iOS/Android/cross-platform concepts, device mockups, readable type, coherent screen sets.

plugins.name: brandkit
plugins.description: Premium brand-kit image generation: brand-guidelines boards, logo systems, identity decks, and visual-world presentations across categories.

plugins.name: imagegen-suite
plugins.description: All three image-generation skills in one plugin: website comps, mobile screens and flows, and premium brand-kit boards.
